title: nilgirianthus membranaceus
intro: Nilgirianthus membranaceus, also known as the Nilgiri cordia, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to their antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Nilgirianthus membranaceus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of asthma, and provide relief from coughs and colds. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is used in various herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and treat various health ailments.
